attacking_style: Long-range solo attacks from breakaways, typically surviving deep into finals (3-10km to go) through superior climbing endurance rather than explosive acceleration.
team_tactics: Operates from breakaway positions rather than team-led setups; appears to race opportunistically without heavy domestique support visible in observations.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where climbing depth and endurance matter more than explosive power; performs strongly on home roads suggesting familiarity aids positioning.
vulnerability: Unable to sustain solo efforts to the line when facing organized GC team pressure in final kilometers; lacks finishing power after extended efforts.
key_patterns: Attacks from breakaways rather than peloton, surviving solo deep into finales (2 instances)
Strong on home terrain/roads, suggesting local knowledge aids tactical execution (2 instances)
Excels at long solo survival efforts 50km+, not short punchy attacks (2 instances)
Caught in final 3-10km despite strong rides, suggesting finishing limitation (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: showed consistent climbing strength and breakaway survival ability across June-August 2019 window
